notes: MASTER rack elevation: realistic faceplate rows + cross-platform heights (built on live v1.6.55, never-deployed v1.6.56 folded in). Replaces the old 8U-assumption block renderer. Per-host height is data-driven in priority order: (1) Nru parsed from the model name (ps-1ru=1U, cdu-4ru=4U) wins; (2) GPU-family fallback for chassis whose U isn't in the name - H100/H200/A100 HGX/DGX nodes = 8U, GB200/GB300 NVL72 trays = 1U; (3) default 1U (switches, panels, NVLink trays, shelves). So the elevation is correct on BOTH GB300 sites (1U trays) and H100/H200 sites (8U nodes) with no per-site code. Rack total-U is dynamic per cabinet (covers highest occupied U, floored at 48). Each unit renders as a faceplate: color-coded edge + LED + hostname + port ticks + type tag, colored by equipment type via the data-driven master_hostType classifier (GPU/SWITCH/POWER/CDU/PATCH/FW/STORAGE/CPU). Row height 30px, scoped to the elevation; the shared Cage Nut Compass cn-* visual and the compass page's 38px rows are untouched. Verified: JS parse OK, CSS balanced 2401/2401; headless tests pass on the real US-MKO01 GB300 cabinet dh1:022 (38 hosts, 0 unplaced, CDU 4U) AND a synthetic H100 rack (8U nodes place at U1-8/9-16/17-24/25-32, no overlap).
